action_instruction: Waiting briefly with the newest Home feed post visible
intent: PRIMARY: wait briefly on the Home feed to confirm the newest post is visible
rationale: The Home feed is already visible and the newest post appears at the top with an image and '+30 points', so step 1 is satisfied; pausing briefly helps ensure the feed has settled before running the required checkpoint analyzes next.

action_instruction: Checking whether the newest Home feed post contains an image element with a non-empty src attribute
intent: PRIMARY: is a new feed post present and does it contain an image element with a non-empty src attribute? Answer true or false. | HINTS: the newest post at the very top of the Home feed (the one showing "just now" and the "+30 points · Dinner" line)

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is a new feed post present and does it contain an image element with a non-empty src attribute? Answer true or false. | HINTS: the newest post at the very top of the Home feed (the one showing "just now" and the "+30 points · Dinner" line)

action_instruction: Checking whether the newest top post in the Home feed shows the text "+30 points".
intent: PRIMARY: is the text "+30 points" visible on the newest post at the top of the Home feed? Answer true or false. | HINTS: the topmost feed card under the large photo, near the activity label "Dinner"

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is the text "+30 points" visible on the newest post at the top of the Home feed? Answer true or false. | HINTS: the topmost feed card under the large photo, near the activity label "Dinner"

assertion_tree.description: On the Home feed, verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+30 points".

sub_results.description: A new feed post is present and contains an image element with a non-empty src attribute
The new feed post shows "+30 points"

action_instruction: Checking whether there is no error message and no error overlay visible on the Home feed.
intent: PRIMARY: is NO error message and NO error overlay visible/present on the Home feed right now? Answer true or false. | HINTS: scan the whole screen for any error banner, toast, modal, or overlay covering content

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is NO error message and NO error overlay visible/present on the Home feed right now? Answer true or false. | HINTS: scan the whole screen for any error banner, toast, modal, or overlay covering content

assertion_tree.description: Verify no error message or error overlay is shown.

sub_results.description: No error message and no error overlay are visible on the Home feed

action_instruction: Verifying whether the topmost home feed post card below the large photo shows a green points label.
intent: PRIMARY: a home feed post is visible showing a green points label | HINTS: in the topmost post card below the large photo Always answer true/false, nothing else.

action_params.query: PRIMARY: a home feed post is visible showing a green points label | HINTS: in the topmost post card below the large photo Always answer true/false, nothing else.
